title: Malik's Colorful Snacks
synopsis: Little Malik explores different colored foods, learning about colors through delicious snacks like red apples, yellow bananas, and green peas.

pages.text: Malik is hungry! He looks at his colorful snacks.

illustration.description: Malik with short twists, dark brown skin, gentle expressive eyes sits at a small table with rainbow-colored foods spread out, dominant rainbow swirls with paint splatter drips in finger paint aesthetic
illustration.alt: Malik sitting at table with colorful foods

pages.text: Red apple! Crunch, crunch. Malik smiles. Red is sweet!

illustration.description: Malik with short twists, dark brown skin, gentle expressive eyes holding a bright red apple, dominant red paint splatters and drips surrounding him in joyful pure color finger paint style

pages.text: Yellow banana! Peel, peel. Malik giggles. Yellow is soft!

illustration.description: Malik with short twists, dark brown skin, gentle expressive eyes peeling a banana, dominant yellow splashy painterly background with sensory visual paint drips in finger paint aesthetic

pages.text: Green peas! Pop, pop. Malik claps. Green is fun!

illustration.description: Malik with short twists, dark brown skin, gentle expressive eyes eating green peas from a bowl, dominant green color exploration with splashy painterly drips and joyful pure color finger paint style

pages.text: Orange carrots! Munch, munch. Malik laughs. Orange is crunchy!

illustration.description: Malik with short twists, dark brown skin, gentle expressive eyes biting an orange carrot, dominant orange paint splatter drips with sensory visual finger paint aesthetic and joyful pure color

pages.text: Purple grapes! Squish, squish. Malik is happy. Colors taste good!

illustration.description: Malik with short twists, dark brown skin, gentle expressive eyes with purple grapes, dominant purple splashy painterly background with paint splatter drips in color exploration finger paint aesthetic

metadata.illustrationStyle: rainbow colors, splashy painterly, one color dominant per scene, paint splatter drips, sensory visual, joyful pure color, finger paint aesthetic, color exploration

questions.question: What color is Malik's apple?
questions.explanation: Malik's apple is red! Red apples are sweet and crunchy.

questions.question: What does Malik do with the banana?
questions.explanation: Malik peels the banana! You have to peel bananas before eating them.

questions.question: How does Malik feel about the colorful foods?
questions.explanation: Malik is happy! He smiles, giggles, claps, and laughs while eating his colorful snacks.
